raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"product","confidence":0.9,"matched_text":"I've been looking at getting a Manduka eKO mat, I've heard great things about it.","distilled_fact":"The speaker has been looking at getting a Manduka eKO mat."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"product_experience","confidence":0.92,"matched_text":"I've also been meaning to get my yoga mat replaced, it's been feeling a bit slippery lately.","distilled_fact":"The speaker's yoga mat has been feeling a bit slippery lately."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"product_ownership","confidence":0.88,"matched_text":"I've had it for about a year now and it's been getting a lot of use, especially since I started taking classes at the studio 3 times a week.","distilled_fact":"The speaker has had the yoga mat for about a year."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"activity_frequency","confidence":0.84,"matched_text":"I've had it for about a year now and it's been getting a lot of use, especially since I started taking classes at the studio 3 times a week.","distilled_fact":"The speaker started taking classes at the studio 3 times a week."}]}
